---
title: "💬 Talking"
subtitle: "Talks and presentations I have given"
---

**[2025-11-10]** _Quantos votos meu partido vai fazer? Prevendo o vote share nos municípios fluminenses_. 10th Student Week of the Postgraduate Programs of IESP-UERJ. 18th Working Group -- Politics and institutions at the subnational level. [[files]](https://github.com/felipelmc/Presentations/tree/main/GT-Jornada-Discente-IESP-2025)

**[2025-08-29]** _Fatores explicativos do apoio ou rejeição à criação de uma política municipal de renda básica: modelando a percepção dos cariocas_. [BIEN Congress 2025](https://bien2025.com.br/) / 24th Congress of the Global Basic Income Network. [[pdf]](https://github.com/felipelmc/Presentations/blob/main/BIEN-2025/bien2025.pdf)

**[2025-07-02]** _Automated Text Analysis_. Summer Institute in Computation Social Science 2025, Brazil ([SICSS](https://sicss.io/2025/fgv-ecmi-brazil/)) [[pdf]](https://github.com/felipelmc/Presentations/blob/main/SICSS-2025/sicss2025.pdf)
